statements.query: MATCH (v:ProxmoxVM {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE v.template = false SET v.exposed_internet = false
statements.name: Initialize exposed_internet flag

statements.query: MATCH (v:ProxmoxVM {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:HAS_NETWORK_INTERFACE]->(i:ProxmoxNetworkInterface {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE i.bridge = 'vmbr0' AND v.status = 'running' SET v.exposed_internet = true
statements.name: Mark VMs with internet-facing interfaces

statements.query: MATCH (n:ProxmoxNode {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE n.status <> 'online' SET n.availability_risk = true
statements.name: Mark offline nodes as availability risk
